summary: I addressed the critic's feedback (F1) in `app/javascript/controllers/theme_controller.js`: `toggle()` now calls a new `stopWatchingSystemTheme()` method that removes the `matchMedia` `change` listener and clears `this.media` once the user makes an explicit choice. This prevents a later OS theme change from firing `onSystemChange` and overriding the user's manual toggle within the same page session (no navigation required). `disconnect()` remains safe since it now no-ops if `this.media` was already cleared by `toggle()`.
